text:
i make clean install of /usr/ports/www/apache22-peruser-mpm on clean system amd64 or i386. if i try start apache by rc.d or httpd -X, it falls with segmentation fault (signal 11)

Fix: 

not available
How-To-Repeat: install /usr/ports/www/apache22-peruser-mpm and start via rc.d or httpd -X
